===================
===================
=== bobdylan_helsinki_oct9_03.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan - Hartwall Areena, Helsinki, Finland, Oct 9 2003
17+2 tracks, 57:48/59:02, 2 CDR.

source: Sound Professional BMC6-mics (AT803b, omni-directional) -> SP batterybox ->
Nomad JB3 (48.0kHz WAV, zero gain) -> USB -> Bias Peak -> few edits -> SHNTool -> SHN -> Wav -> Flac -> You.

CD 1:
1.  Intro
2.  To Be Alone With You
3.  It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
4.  Cry A While
5.  If You See Her, Say Hello
6.  It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
7.  Boots Of Spanish Leather
8.  Things Have Changed
9.  Highway 61 Revisited
10. Make You Feel My Love

CD 2:
1. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum
2. Every Grain Of Sand
3. Honest With Me
4. Mr. Tambourine Man
5. Summer Days
6. Cat's In The Well
7. Band intros
8. Like A Rolling Stone
9. All Along The Watchtower

Notes: 
-CD 1, track 3, has a glitch at 3:36.
-Do not sell this show.
-Do not distribute lossy files (mp3/vqf/etc) of this show.
